core_mechanism: score-function (policy-gradient / REINFORCE) optimization of a Markov decision process whose per-step action is factored into two coupled sub-decisions, so that the gradient of the expected return decomposes additively into one estimator term per action factor
brief_reason: The abstract formalizes the generation process as a two-stage-action MDP and shows the policy gradient 'naturally decomposes' into a token term and a masking term, which is a factored-action score-function gradient.
